hp-editorial-module hp-item3" data-metrics-module="hp-news"><div class="module-content"><header class="module-header"><div class="module-sub-header"><!----><h2>Health News</h2><a data-metrics-link="all" class="module-sub-header-link" href="https://www.webmd.com/news/default.htm"> View All </a></div></header><div class="module-container"><!----><ul class="list-container-2"><div class="module-list"><!--[--><li><a href="https://www.webmd.com/diet/news/20260212/cm/is-full-fat-dairy-healthy-now-what-to-know" data-metrics-link="1" class="module-list-link"><div class="image-container"><img class="module-list-image" alt="photo of 30s woman eating small cup of yogurt as afternoon snack"><!----></div><div class="module-text"><!----><h3 class="module-list-title">Full-Fat Dairy: Healthy Choice or Still a Concern?</h3><p class="module-list-text">Dairy is back in the spotlight, with yogurt, full-fat options, and even federal guidance giving it new attention. So what does that mean for cheese -- and LDL cholesterol -- when it comes to heart health?</p></div></a></li><li><a href="https://www.webmd.com/drugs/news/20260109/these-7-aspirin-myths-wont-die" data-metrics-link="2" class="module-list-link"><!----><div class="module-text"><!----><h3 class="module-list-title">7 Aspirin Myths That Continue to Circulate in 2026</h3><!----></div></a></li><li><a href="https://www.webmd.com/beauty/news/20251216/hair-dye-health-risks" data-metrics-link="3" class="module-list-link"><!----><div class="module-text"><!----><h3 class="module-list-title">What to Know About Hair Dye and Health</h3><!----></div></a></li><li><a href="https://www.webmd.com/obesity/news/20251230/how-new-glp-1-weight-loss-pill-compares-to-shots" data-metrics-link="4" class="module-content"><header class="module-header"><div class="module-sub-header"><!----><h2>Tools, Trackers &amp; Calculators</h2><!----></div></header><div class="module-container"><!----><ul class="module-content"><div class="module-container"><div class="module-list"><div class="image-container"><img src="https://img.lb.wbmdstatic.com/vim/live/webmd/consumer_assets/site_images/home_page/webmd-mission.jpg"></div><div class="module-text"><h3>Our Content Is Different Because We Set the Bar Higher</h3><div class="desc-text"><p>As a leader in digital health publishing for more than 25 years, WebMD strives to maintain the most comprehensive and reliable source of health and medical information on the internet.</p> <p>We recognize the responsibility that comes along with being the most well-known and trusted health information platform — and we take that responsibility seriously by:</p></div><ul class="list-container"><!--[--><li><span class="li-num">01</span><span class="li-text"><div>Charging our content creators to practice <b>journalistic principles</b> of excellence and provide objective, accurate, and balanced reporting</div></span></li><li><span class="li-num">02</span><span class="li-text"><div>Maintaining  <b>editorial independence </b> and transparency into how we protect the integrity of our content</div></span></li><li><span class="li-num">03</span><span class="li-text"><div>Regularly reviewing and updating our content by working with our network of  <b>more than 100 doctors and health experts</b></div></span></li><!--]--></ul><div class="ed-process"><a href="https://www.webmd.com/about-webmd-policies/default.htm">Learn more about our Editorial Process</a></div></div></div></div></div></section></div></div></div></div></main><div class="webmd-row container global-container-2" style="" span="24" tabindex="-1" data-js="global-container-2"><div
